overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a walk through a foggy forested mountain environment. The player travels along a grassy trail beside a river, approaches an NPC standing on a cliff edge, and continues along the cliffside path revealing expansive misty valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest trail along river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dense foggy forest along a grassy path beside a river

entered.detail: tall evergreen pine trees with thick trunks surrounding the path
misty river visible through the trees on the right side
scattered rocks and boulders on the forest floor
rocky cliff formation visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense foggy forest with tall pine trees surrounding the path. A river flows to the right, partially visible through the mist and vegetation, while rocky outcrops dot the grassy ground. The atmosphere is quiet and misty with limited visibility.

events.description: game UI prompt 'PICK and EXAMINE PLANT' appears at bottom right of screen
NPC character becomes visible standing on the cliff edge ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a character standing on the cliff edge while walking along the forest trail

notable_agents.action: standing motionless on the cliff edge facing the valley

entered.detail: large rocky cliff formation with vertical face where the character stands
small leafy shrubs growing alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Approaching a rocky cliff outcrop where an NPC stands at the edge overlooking the valley. The forest opens up slightly, revealing more of the river and the cliff formation ahead. A game UI prompt appears indicating an interactive element nearby.

events.description: path curves left along the cliff edge revealing expansive valley views to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow cliff edge path with the valley opening up to the right

entered.detail: expansive view of the misty valley with distant forested terrain below
rocky cliff edge dropping off sharply to the valley floor

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow dirt path that curves along the cliff edge. The dense forest gives way to open views of a foggy valley below, with scattered pine trees along the path and the steep cliff drop visible on the right side.

events.description: bird flies across the sky from left to right over the valley

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff top with panoramic views of the misty valley and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: bird flying across the sky from left to right

entered.detail: hazy mountain silhouettes visible through the fog on the horizon
grassy cliff ledge with rocky outcrops at the edge

segments.scene_description: Reaching a high vantage point on the cliff top with panoramic views of the fog-filled valley and distant mountains. The terrain is grassy with scattered rocks and pine trees, while a bird flies across the overcast sky above the misty landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of a foggy forest to an expansive, high-altitude vantage point. It begins by navigating a grassy trail flanked by tall pine trees and a partially obscured river, where dense mist limits visibility among rocky outcrops. As the camera moves forward, the forest opens up toward a rocky cliff outcrop where an NPC stands overlooking the valley, signaled by an interactive UI prompt. The scene then shifts as the path curves along the narrow cliff edge, causing the dense woodland to give way to steep drops and emerging views of the foggy depths below. Finally, the movement reaches a high plateau of grass and stone, revealing a panoramic vista of distant mountains and a fog-filled valley under an overcast sky as a bird flies overhead.
